legacy.content:
# Phase 41-01 Plan - Content Pack Release Artifacts
## Goal Ship release-ready content-pack artifacts with every CI/tagged release so packs can be consumed, audited, and indexed.
## Scope - Add engine script to generate: - versioned content-pack bundle - content-pack report summary - content-pack release index metadata - Wire tag release workflow to publish these artifacts. - Wire docs browser workflow to publish SHA-versioned equivalents.
